behaviorsAudited: createBridgeTool('Write') routes to FileWriteView when content carries the <write-summary> envelope
FileWriteView renders the file path bolded plus a green summary line with the byte count when present
If only the path or only the byte count is available, FileWriteView still produces a coherent summary (e.g. 'Wrote file' fallback)

message-adapter.formatStructuredToolResult for tool_call_completed with toolName='Write' computes a byte count from result.bytesWritten OR result.content.length and produces the <write-file>/<write-summary> envelope

edgeCasesAudited: Write result with bytesWritten present takes precedence over content.length for the byte count
Write result with content but no bytesWritten falls back to content.length
Write result missing both bytesWritten and content produces a 'Wrote file' summary without a byte count
Write result missing the path field still renders the green summary line (no header)
Write with the legacy single-string content shape falls through to generic Text without crashing
Write result with bytesWritten=1 produces 'Wrote 1 byte' (singular), not 'Wrote 1 bytes'

behaviorEvidence.createBridgeTool('Write') routes to File: Dispatcher at runtime/src/agenc/adapters/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.ts:87-92 (exact-case 'Write' + presence of '<write-summary>' tag → 'file-write-view'); switch-case in renderToolResultMessage at runtime/src/tui/bridges/tool-stubs.tsx:414-415 returns <FileWriteView/>; pre-seed in createBridgeTools at runtime/src/tui/bridges/tool-stubs.tsx:478. Tests: runtime/src/tools/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.test.ts:98-102 ('Write' + '<write-summary>' → 'file-write-view'); runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:147-155 (end-to-end: tool.renderToolResultMessage returns a node whose .type === FileWriteView); runtime/src/tools/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.test.ts:137-149 (lowercase 'write' falls through to 'generic' — exact-case enforcement).
behaviorEvidence.FileWriteView renders the file path bold: Implementation at runtime/src/tui/bridges/tool-stubs.tsx:142-155: extracts <write-file> at line 147 and renders <Text bold> at line 151 when path length > 0; renders <Text color="green"> at line 152 with the extracted <write-summary>. Tests: runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:157-167 (asserts header.props.children === 'src/out.ts' with bold === true; summary.props.color === 'green' with children === 'Wrote 42 bytes').
behaviorEvidence.If only the path or only the byte count: Implementation at runtime/src/tui/bridges/tool-stubs.tsx:148: `extractBridgeTag(content, 'write-summary') ?? 'Wrote file'` defaults to literal 'Wrote file' when no <write-summary> tag is present. Tests: runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:179-184 (FileWriteView called with content === '' → green summary child whose text is 'Wrote file'). Adapter-level analog at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:295-301 (formatStructuredToolResult Write with `{ result: { path: 'x' } }` produces '<write-summary>Wrote file x</write-summary>').
behaviorEvidence.message-adapter.formatStructuredToolResu: Implementation at runtime/src/tui/bridges/message-adapter.ts:406-439: gate at 406-411 requires toolName==='Write' and ('path' in result || 'content' in result); ternary at 419-424 picks bytesWritten first, falls back to content.length, else null; envelope assembled at 425-437 with optional <write-file> only when path is a string. Tests: runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:345-363 (bytesWritten=256 path='src/out.ts' → '<write-summary>Wrote 256 bytes to src/out.ts</write-summary>'; content='hi' path='x' (no bytesWritten) → '<write-summary>Wrote 2 bytes to x</write-summary>'); precedence locked at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:286-293 (bytesWritten=999 + content.length=10 → summary contains '999 bytes' and NOT '10 bytes'); singular form locked at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:278-284; wire-shape lock test at runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:480-492 (formatStructuredToolResult Write output piped through FileWriteView produces a green summary containing '100 bytes').

edgeCaseEvidence.Write result with bytesWritten present t: Implementation at runtime/src/tui/bridges/message-adapter.ts:419-424 (ternary picks `r.bytesWritten` first); asserted at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:286-293 (`{ result: { path: 'x', content: '1234567890', bytesWritten: 999 } }` → summary contains '999 bytes' AND NOT '10 bytes'). Both directions of the ternary are now locked — swapping the order would fail this test.
edgeCaseEvidence.Write result with content but no bytesWr: Implementation at runtime/src/tui/bridges/message-adapter.ts:419-424 (ternary chain falls to `r.content.length` when bytesWritten is not a number); asserted at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:355-362 (`{ result: { path: 'x', content: 'hi' } }` → '<write-summary>Wrote 2 bytes to x</write-summary>').
edgeCaseEvidence.Write result missing both bytesWritten a: Adapter-level implementation at runtime/src/tui/bridges/message-adapter.ts:432 (`Wrote file${path ? ` ${path}` : ''}`); asserted at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:295-301 (`{ result: { path: 'x' } }` → '<write-summary>Wrote file x</write-summary>'). Renderer-level fallback (no envelope at all → 'Wrote file') is also asserted at runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:179-184.
edgeCaseEvidence.Write result missing the path field stil: Implementation at runtime/src/tui/bridges/tool-stubs.tsx:151 (renders bold header only when `file.length > 0`); asserted at runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:179-184 (FileWriteView called with content === '' → green summary child found, no bold header child).
edgeCaseEvidence.Write with the legacy single-string cont: Implementation at runtime/src/agenc/adapters/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.ts:87-92 (presence of '<write-summary>' substring required); end-to-end assertion at runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-extra-bridge.test.tsx:169-177 (createBridgeTool('Write').renderToolResultMessage('raw legacy string', ...) returns a node whose .type !== FileWriteView, i.e. the generic fallback path).
edgeCaseEvidence.Write result with bytesWritten=1 produce: Implementation at runtime/src/tui/bridges/message-adapter.ts:431 (`${bytes === 1 ? 'byte' : 'bytes'}`); asserted at runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:278-284 (`{ result: { path: 'x', bytesWritten: 1 } }` → exact match '<write-summary>Wrote 1 byte to x</write-summary>'). Dropping the singular ternary to a bare 'bytes' constant would now fail this test.

auditDetails.summary: Re-audit: re-keyed behaviorsAudited and edgeCasesAudited to the matrix's verbatim strings (contract checker uses exact-string Set membership). Substantive review remains APPROVED. Tests 122/122 passing. All four required behaviors have implementation + assertion evidence; all six declared edge cases have assertion evidence. No critical or high issues.
